mechanics.excerpt: the Mydron will jam tumble Characters use SMG Skill when wielding this gun Sternsnacht: Something of a oddity in the annals of mod ern weaponry. the Sternsnacht became popular in the 2880s _ when Solaris VII legend Tag Burton wore this monstrosity during his duels.
